zh.lifeSummary: Gwendama DE BAUGE於1044年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易e內特-特雷維-瑙爾特。她於1064年與Stephen Traves在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易e內特-特雷維-瑙爾特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BAUGE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places so named.
Dutch: topographic name denoting an inhabitant of a farm or settlement on a hill. Compare   Ten Barge  .
English and French: metonymic occupational name for a boatman, bargeman, or seaman, from Middle English, Old French barge ‘boat, barge’. Compare French Labarge .

variants.name: Ten Barge
meanings: Dutch: variant of the topographic name Ten Berge ‘at the hill’ (see Berg ).

en.lifeSummary: Gwendama DE BAUGE was born in 1044, in Chênehutte-Trèves-Cunault, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. She married Stephen Traves in 1064, in Chênehutte-Trèves-Cunault, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son.
